hero.title: We're here to help you
hero.subtitle: Have questions? Need legal assistance? Our team is ready to provide the answers and support you need.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Can’t find the answer you’re looking for? Reach out to our customer support team.

questions.question: How quickly do you respond?
questions.answer: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.

questions.question: Can I schedule a consultation?
questions.answer: Yes! You can use our app to book a consultation with a lawyer directly.

questions.question: Where are you located?
questions.answer: We are a digital-first platform, but our headquarters are located in Justice City.
